transcript.text:
[City of Andong, South Korea]
We are the generation of Scholar Yi Hwang's 4th out of 7 siblings
He truly believed in the prosperity of the future and their education
[The generation has been passed down for 500 years]
[Waiting for someone]
[Tzuyang is here to be their daughter in law for 1 day]
You can eat 20 packs of ramyun noodles?
Oh my..
[Don't worry, I won't eat too much]
[Can't help but to applaud]
Hello everyone
Happy Korean New Year
I am here at Andong
I am here to make the traditional foods here at their place
I brought them a gift as well
[1 day experience at a big household]

[Happy]
Hello, Happy Korean New Year!
I heard a lot about you
You are Tzuyang?
Welcome, nice to see you
This has been passed down to us all the way from Scholar Yi Hwang's brother On Gye
I am his 17th generation
This house is 500 years old
All our culture and traditions have been passed down
And will continue to pass it down to our next generations
I'm sure it's the same for the big families
And will have over 100 visitors here
But we are expecting 50~60 visitors
It must be hard
I have something for you guys
I can't possibly accept this without giving you anything

[Here's an apron]
[Let's go make some food]
[Am I going to be okay..?]
Tzuyang!
How many of these do you think you can eat? (Korean mini pancakes)
If they are this small, it's safe to say "100"
[Making Korean pan-fried meatballs]
Hello, welcome
[The neighbors came to visit]
We just came just because
Do you guys know what a mukbang is?
She can eat 20 packs of noodles
This lady right here? There's no way
Her name is Tzuyang
Tzuyang?
[Shy]

Will it be okay if I make a big one? Yes sure
[Then I'll use the rest]
[What is she doing?]
[Prepare to clap]
You're ready to get married
[Coating the big meatball with egg]
[And pan-frying it]
That's good
[A Successful Flip]
Its name is Donguri
King Donguri
It looks like the moon
[Making the eggplant pancake]
Just slightly angled
[Cutting it up as she is taught]
[Pan-frying]

[Finishing it up with the seasoning]
Good job, it's pretty
I just heard that she's famous
YouTube
What category?
Mukbang Tzuyang
[He knows it all]
She was very interested in learning the history of our acestors
I'm very thankful for that
That kind of mentality itself is worth being praised especially from our younger generations
I'm very proud of her mindset
[Napa Cabbage Pancake]
[Today's Flipper]
[Easily done]
[Good job]
[Showing off now]

[Tzuyang is the best!]
[Shooting finger hearts]
The next dish is Japchae (glass noodles with vegetables)
Cooking the vegetables
[Making Japchae]
It's painful in the legs and the back to cook
But it's okay if you think of it as that it's all for the family that you love
[Nice one]
Have a taste
It's not seasoned yet
Yes, nothing is in yet
Not even sugar
But it's still delicious
We're going to make steamed baby pork
[Korean traditional cuisine that the kings enjoyed]
[Boil the pork belly]

We have to then pan-fry with oil
Not like this, but like this
Wow, that looks amazing
[Cut up the finished pork belly]
[Plate it]
[Top it off with the sauce]
[Satisfied]
I was very surprised
She is so good at this
She is trying to learn, that's why she's even more beautiful
[Preparing to eat]
I only take this out on special occasions
Have you heard about the Andong Soju? (Alcohol)
Finish it up and come inside
[It's finally mukbang time]
[Getting the table ready]

[Returning to the kitchen]
She can eat 20 packs of noodles
She can eat 20 of them? In 1 seating?
That's what she says
Where does that all go to?
I asked her how many meatball pancakes she can eat And she said 100
What? 100?
[On my way to eat]
Tzuyang, you have definitely earned your right to eat here with us today
You are welcomed here as a daughter in law
Me too
How do you feel experiencing the Korean New Year here in the big household?
Well first off,
I didn't really do this back at home
And now I'm just realizing how difficult/tiring it is
So now I want to go back home to help my family with preparing the foods

Be healthy, many blessings with work
Gain over 10,000 subscribers per day
You can do it
[Andong Soju contains 45% ALC]
Wow, this is very strong
May your year be filled with blessings, Maintain good health for a long time
[That's nice]
We are ready to watch you eat now
[Time to recharge]
[Rice Cake Soup with Kimchi]
You are so good at eating. So precious
Have this moon pancake
[Everything tastes better when you make it yourself]
[1 bowl down]
[I'm not done yet]
Go bring more for her

Do you want more soup?
Is there more left?
She probably has a very high metabolism
[It's only 2 bowls]
Oh my...
Does the last bite taste just like the first bite? Yes
[Thank you for inviting me here as a daughter-in-law]
Happy Korean New Year
[Tzuyang is kidnapped!?]
[She's really here!]
[Tzuyang and the broadcasting guys]
You're so pretty
[Tzuyang and the Broadcasting Guys]
[23 servings of Small Intestines 5.42m views]
[2kg of Boiled Pork Belly 6.63m views]
[9 King Tiger Shrimps 5.76m views]

[150 Pieces of Tuna 4.9m views]
[Soju is what? One-shot]
[422 days of mukbang and 1.82m subscribers]
[3 Broadcasting Jockey Awards]
[Queen of Mukbang: Tzuyang]
[Tzuyang and the Broadcasting Guys Collaboration]
[Tzuyang is coming here?]
[She is here!]
You're so pretty
No way (humble)
The camera is at fault You are so much prettier in real life
We made this just for you
Red carpet as well
That was a red carpet?
I thought it was under construction
I'm sure you've heard this about 500 times already

How do you stay skinny?
What goes on inside the bathroom?
It's a very sensitive topic, but
I do go to the bathroom a lot
[Honest interviews]
Why is the 1.82m subscriber YouTuber here today?
Honestly,
I've always wanted to do something very extreme
And I wanted to work with a team
Just like other variety shows Camping, grocery shopping, etc
[That's not hard at all]
[Tzuyang's Homestay]
[Tzuyang's Grocery Shopping Show]
[Tzuyang's Law of the Jungle]
[List of shows she wants to do]
You can't forget about the delicious foods at meetings

So we prepared some late night snacks for you
[A very small snack that we prepared for Tzuyang]
I don't think the world's #1 can even finish all of this
[It must have been hard only having 1 channel to upload]
Wow, that's tasty
Is there a boneless for the soy sauce flavor?
Has anyone challenged you to a mukbang battle?
A battle?
No way
They can't win!
[Accepting challengers]
What's your goals in terms of views
Oh like how many likes this video gets and stuff?
1 million? 2 million?
I think 1 million
What will you do if it hits 1 million views?

Do I need to do something?
Rap
That's kinda.. Can I change it to 2 million?
1.5 million
We'll give you 1 rapper to rap with
Eminem? Ha-on? BeWhy?
How about (censored)
Then this YouTube channel might be our last one
I'm not afraid to get fired
Subtitles by Hyun Choi antharoni@gmail.com
